description: Spec cites an obscure manufacturer model number that the verifier could not find in any datasheet or product listing.

finding.issue: Specification cites Acme Sensor Co. model ATM-4225-CA without a manufacturer datasheet or California listing reference.

paragraph_map_slice.text: A. Acme Sensor Co. model ATM-4225-CA, or approved equal.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: Searched for Acme Sensor Co. model ATM-4225-CA across manufacturer listings and product directories. No matching datasheet or product page was found. The manufacturer name is generic enough that multiple companies use it; without a manufacturer URL or part lookup, the model number cannot be independently verified.

ground_truth.notes: An obscure manufacturer model the verifier cannot find legitimately produces UNVERIFIED. The finding stays for the reviewer to investigate, but no auto-edit is appropriate.
